sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98500" key="sumpanhguristai/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμπᾰνηγῠρ-ισταί</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n98500.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">persons who join in keeping festival</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.34</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
